address: 31 St Marks Pl, New York, NY 10003, USA

sources_checked.limitation: Menu page is an image gallery only (Wix site); no extractable dish text. Confirms restaurant identity (address, phone) but no menu content.
Empty JS-shell on initial fetch (no-JS placeholder); not escalated to Chrome since Grubhub (same underlying menu data source, sister platform) was tried instead.

Escalated to Chrome rendering (initial web_fetch not attempted directly, navigated in browser). Confirmed restaurant identity (name, address, phone, hours match). Only a 'Best Sellers' module rendered with 5 dish names + prices, no descriptions. Full category tabs (Donburi, Hotpot, Sushi teishoku, Rice & noodle, etc.) are present in the page but their itemized contents did not render/expand in the accessibility tree within the time box (likely lazy-loaded on scroll/click with additional interaction not achieved in time). Rejected as incomplete for full-menu extraction; partial best-seller list saved to raw/kimura/grubhub_bestsellers_partial.txt for future revisit but NOT used for normalized dish records due to lack of descriptions and lack of coverage of most menu sections.

manual_review_reason: Only a partial 'Best Sellers' list (5 items, no descriptions) could be rendered from the Grubhub ordering page within the sourcing time box; the official website menu is image-only with no extractable text; full itemized menu (14 categories including Hotpot, which is the restaurant's specialty and allergen-relevant) was not retrievable. Needs revisit with either: (a) more patient/scrolled Chrome rendering of Grubhub category tabs, (b) OCR of the official site's menu photo images, or (c) checking the Lunch Menu / Drinks sub-pages on kimuranyc.com.
